overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a sunlit beach with a ruined amusement park and ferris wheel in the background, transitioning through a dark underpass stairway into an urban plaza featuring a distinctive rainbow-striped building.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach with amusement park ruins

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the beach toward the waterline with the amusement park visible ahead

entered.detail: large white ferris wheel structure part of the ruined amusement park across the water
metal roller coaster tracks extending over the water
calm water reflecting the morning sunlight
tall modern buildings under construction with cranes
scattered rocks and trash on the sand

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit beach with the wreckage of an amusement park featuring a large ferris wheel and roller coaster visible across the water. Skyscrapers under construction rise in the background while scattered debris lies on the sand.

events.description: approaching and entering the shadowed underpass beneath the highway overpass
lighting dims significantly as the camera moves into the covered area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the beach toward the concrete underpass entrance, passing a lifeguard tower

entered.detail: wooden elevated hut with ramp on the beach
multi-story building with yellow signage reading LOS OSOS
dark tunnel entrance leading under the highway

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the beach past a wooden lifeguard tower, approaching a concrete underpass. The Los Osos building becomes visible on the right as the camera moves toward the shadowed tunnel entrance, with the ferris wheel now visible to the left.

events.description: entering the dark covered stairway beneath the highway
bright daylight becomes visible at the top of the stairs indicating the exit

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs through the underpass, following another pedestrian toward the exit

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white top ascending the stairs ahead of the camera

entered.detail: long flight of concrete stairs with metal railings on both sides
silver metal handrails along the stair edges
dark concrete ceiling with embedded light fixtures

segments.scene_description: Ascending a long concrete stairway through a dimly lit underpass beneath the highway. Metal railings line both sides of the stairs as the camera follows another pedestrian toward the bright exit at the top where a colorful building becomes visible.

events.description: exiting the underpass into bright sunlight and open urban space
character reaches top of stairs and transitions to level walking

agents.ego_description: walking through the urban plaza following the pedestrian ahead, with the rainbow building prominent ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead on the concrete plaza toward the colorful building

entered.detail: multi-story parking structure with distinctive horizontal rainbow colored stripes
open concrete pedestrian area with scattered debris
tall modern street lamp with multiple fixtures

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass into a sunlit urban plaza featuring a distinctive multi-story building with horizontal rainbow stripes. The camera follows a pedestrian walking along the concrete promenade with palm trees lining the path, while the ferris wheel is visible again in the far left distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a desolate, sunlit beach into a vibrant urban plaza. It begins by traversing sandy shores littered with debris, moving past the wreckage of a ferris wheel and roller coaster while skyscrapers under construction loom in the distance. As the camera passes a wooden lifeguard tower, the scene shifts toward the shadowed entrance of a concrete underpass, with the Los Osos building appearing on the right. The perspective then transitions into a dimly lit ascent up a long concrete stairway beneath a highway, following a pedestrian toward a bright exit. Finally, the camera emerges from the darkness into a sunlit promenade lined with palm trees, opening up to reveal a distinctive multi-story building with horizontal rainbow stripes.
